---
title: "GIS Maps"
---

A highlight of past GIS work, completed in ArcGIS Pro.

---

![](maps/nationalmall.png)

**A Walking Tour of the National Mall**

*ArcGIS Pro · 2023*

---

![](maps/ethiopia.png)

**Sustainable Forestry Regions in Ethiopia**

*ArcGIS Pro · 2023*

---

![](maps/europeaccident.png)

**Risk Analysis of Northern European Accident**

*ArcGIS Pro · 2023*
